curation_notes: Patch commit is a merge commit (PR #972). Two non-test source files changed: src/Lib/RemoteFile/RemoteFile.php (added verifyAllowedHosts method and host allowlist parameter to exists()) and src/Model/Table/ProductsTable.php (added sync domain fetching and host validation in changeImage(), changed image validation from getimagesize() to mime_content_type()). Pre-assigned class race-condition retained: CWE-367 (TOCTOU) accurately describes the vulnerability mechanism where the HEAD check and subsequent GET retrieval can receive different responses from a malicious server. CWE-918 (SSRF) describes the impact but is not one of the 13 valid classes. No sibling files share the same vulnerability pattern.
